en: When Jesus had spoken these words, he lifted up his eyes to heaven, and said, "Father, the hour has come; glorify your Son that the Son may glorify you,
zh: 耶穌講完了這些話，就舉目望天，說：“父啊，時候到了，求你榮耀你的兒子，讓兒子也榮耀你，

en: since you have given him authority over all flesh, to give eternal life to all whom you have given him.
zh: 正如你把管理全人類的權柄給了他，使他賜永生給你所賜給他的人。

en: And this is eternal life, that they know you the only true God, and Jesus Christ whom you have sent.
zh: 認識你是獨一的真神，並且認識你所差來的耶穌基督，這就是永生。

en: I glorified you on earth, having accomplished the work that you gave me to do.
zh: 我在地上已經榮耀了你，你交給我要作的工，我已經完成了。

en: And now, Father, glorify me in your own presence with the glory that I had with you before the world existed.
zh: 父啊，現在讓我在你自己面前得著榮耀，就是在創世以前我與你同享的榮耀。

en: "I have manifested your name to the people whom you gave me out of the world. Yours they were, and you gave them to me, and they have kept your word.
zh: “你從世上分別出來賜給我的人，我已經把你的名顯明給他們了。他們是你的，你把他們賜給了我，他們也遵守了你的道。

en: Now they know that everything that you have given me is from you.
zh: 現在他們知道，你所給我的，無論是甚麼，都是從你那裡來的；

en: For I have given them the words that you gave me, and they have received them and have come to know in truth that I came from you; and they have believed that you sent me.
zh: 因為你賜給我的話，我已經給了他們，他們也領受了，又確實知道我是從你那裡來的，並且信你差了我來。

en: I am praying for them. I am not praying for the world but for those whom you have given me, for they are yours.
zh: 我為他們求；我不為世人求，而是為你賜給我的人求，因為他們是你的。

en: All mine are yours, and yours are mine, and I am glorified in them.
zh: 我的一切都是你的，你的一切也是我的，並且我因著他們得了榮耀。

en: And I am no longer in the world, but they are in the world, and I am coming to you. Holy Father, keep them in your name, which you have given me, that they may be one, even as we are one.
zh: 我不再在這世上，他們卻在這世上，我要到你那裡去。聖父啊，求你因你賜給我的名，保守他們，使他們合而為一，好像我們一樣。

en: While I was with them, I kept them in your name, which you have given me. I have guarded them, and not one of them has been lost except the son of destruction, that the Scripture might be fulfilled.
zh: 我跟他們在一起的時候，因你賜給我的名，我保守了他們，也護衛了他們；他們中間除了那滅亡的人以外，沒有一個是滅亡的，這就應驗了經上的話。

en: But now I am coming to you, and these things I speak in the world, that they may have my joy fulfilled in themselves.
zh: 現在我到你那裡去，我在世上說這些話，是要他們心裡充滿我的喜樂。

en: I have given them your word, and the world has hated them because they are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
zh: 我把你的道賜給了他們；世人恨他們，因為他們不屬於這世界，像我不屬於這世界一樣。

en: I do not ask that you take them out of the world, but that you keep them from the evil one.
zh: 我不求你使他們離開世界，只求你保守他們脫離那惡者。

en: They are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
zh: 他們不屬於這世界，像我不屬於這世界一樣。

en: Sanctify them in the truth; your word is truth.
zh: 求你用真理使他們成聖；你的道就是真理。

en: As you sent me into the world, so I have sent them into the world.
zh: 你怎樣差我到世上來，我也怎樣差他們到世上去。

en: And for their sake I consecrate myself, that they also may be sanctified in truth.
zh: 我為了他們的緣故，自己分別為聖，使他們也因著真理成聖。

en: "I do not ask for these only, but also for those who will believe in me through their word,
zh: “我不但為他們求，也為那些因他們的話而信我的人求，

en: that they may all be one, just as you, Father, are in me, and I in you, that they also may be in us, so that the world may believe that you have sent me.
zh: 使他們都合而為一，像父你在我裡面，我在你裡面一樣；使他們也在我們裡面，讓世人相信你差了我來。

en: The glory that you have given me I have given to them, that they may be one even as we are one,
zh: 你賜給我的榮耀，我已經賜給了他們，使他們合而為一，像我們合而為一。

en: I in them and you in me, that they may become perfectly one, so that the world may know that you sent me and loved them even as you loved me.
zh: 我在他們裡面，你在我裡面，使他們完完全全合而為一，讓世人知道你差了我來，並且知道你愛他們，好像愛我一樣。

en: Father, I desire that they also, whom you have given me, may be with me where I am, to see my glory that you have given me because you loved me before the foundation of the world.
zh: 父啊，我在哪裡，願你賜給我的人也和我同在哪裡，讓他們看見你賜給我的榮耀，因為在創立世界以前，你已經愛我了。

en: O righteous Father, even though the world does not know you, I know you, and these know that you have sent me.
zh: 公義的父啊，世人雖然不認識你，我卻認識你，這些人也知道你差了我來。

en: I made known to them your name, and I will continue to make it known, that the love with which you have loved me may be in them, and I in them."
zh: 我已經把你的名指示他們，還要再指示，使你愛我的愛在他們裡面，我也在他們裡面。”
